title: calpidia corniculata
intro: Calpidia corniculata, also known as the snake root or dragon's blood, is a plant that belongs to the family Asclepiadaceae and is native to the tropical regions of the world. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Calpidia corniculata include reducing fever, treating respiratory infections, and alleviating pain, as well as its potential to act as an anticoagulant. Calpidia corniculata can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
